visual_description: Three men are seated at a desk in a dimly lit room, each wearing headphones and facing forward; one is partially visible from the side. The man on the right adjusts his headphones with both hands while looking forward, and the man in the center gazes ahead with a neutral expression. The scene appears to be an operational or monitoring setting with a dark green wall behind them and a microphone in front of the rightmost man.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a low pitch and a moderate pace, delivering a warning in a neutral tone.
